title: Trust agreement
doc_html:
§599.22. Trust agreement

            A. The corporate trustee under a trust agreement may be a trust company or bank that has the powers of a trust company in or outside of the state.

            B. An expense incurred out of the trust agreement or a resolution may be treated as part of the cost of the operation of a project.

            Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
doc_text:
§599.22. Trust agreement
A. The corporate trustee under a trust agreement may be a trust company or bank that
has the powers of a trust company in or outside of the state.
B. An expense incurred out of the trust agreement or a resolution may be treated as
part of the cost of the operation of a project.
Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
